sql_query: SELECT order_id, customer_id, status, amount FROM showcase_raw.orders WHERE status = 'completed'
SELECT order_id, customer_id, status FROM showcase_raw.orders WHERE status = 'paid'
SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, c.customer_name FROM showcase_raw.orders o INNER JOIN showcase_raw.customers_clean c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
SELECT o.order_id FROM showcase_raw.orders o INNER JOIN showcase_raw.customers_clean c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
SELECT o.order_id FROM showcase_raw.orders o INNER JOIN showcase_raw.customers_clean c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
SELECT o.order_id, o.product_id, p.promo_code FROM showcase_raw.orders o LEFT JOIN showcase_raw.promotions p ON o.product_id = p.product_id
SELECT pr.product_id, p.promo_code FROM showcase_raw.products pr LEFT JOIN showcase_raw.promotions p ON pr.product_id = p.product_id
SELECT order_id, CAST(amount AS VARCHAR) AS amount_str FROM showcase_raw.orders
SELECT * FROM showcase_raw.orders o CROSS JOIN showcase_raw.products p
